strengths: Exceeds experience threshold with 19 years across full software stack; demonstrates mastery of web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure engineering

Proven leadership as staff engineer: founded GISCollective open-source platform, created technical training programs (Selenium course, Web Internals workshop, TDD workshops), and mentored teams on software craftsmanship
Deep technical versatility with multiple languages and systems; currently working on AI agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq
concerns: AI/ML expertise is nascent (2 months in current role); no demonstrated track record of building recognized AI products, platforms, or solutions that would satisfy the 'demonstrated products or platforms built with AI' preference
No evidence of director-level strategic leadership, customer partnerships, or influence with external stakeholders; background is primarily individual contributor and team-level staff engineer
No Master's or PhD in AI-related field; strategic AI domain knowledge not yet established through publications, recognized contributions, or industry visibility in the AI space
response.justification: This candidate is an accomplished full-stack engineer with 19 years of experience and proven staff-level leadership. However, the Principal Engineer role demands deep, demonstrated expertise in AI strategy and product—particularly building and shipping recognized AI platforms—which the candidate has only recently begun exploring. While the candidate's founding of GISCollective and technical leadership are valuable, they represent general software craftsmanship rather than the specialized AI innovation expertise the role requires. The candidate would be better positioned for a senior staff engineering role in infrastructure or a domain-specific track.
